TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_qmaci, title = qmaci, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/qmaci} }

S.FORM: qmaci qmaci qani ga ubuy na wahiy, yaqu gamil nya qu sqamas nha nuka, yasa quktan ta mtalah wayay la,qmaci ga cyux maki ska hlahuy, nanu yasa qu zihung balay san kangi, mha tlu blaq utux ga ini thzyaziy panga txalan, kruma ga sazing hi thozyay panga, sinxalan panga ga kruma ga hbebnu mintzyu pqasu qmamas.

qmaci qmaci qani ga ubuy na wahiy, yaqu gamil nya qu sqamas nha nuka, yasa quktan ta mtalah wayay la,qmaci ga cyux maki ska hlahuy, nanu yasa qu zihung balay san kangi, mha tlu blaq utux ga ini thzyaziy panga txalan, kruma ga sazing hi thozyay panga, sinxalan panga ga kruma ga hbebnu mintzyu pqasu qmamas.
S.PHON: qmaʦ~ʨi qmaʦ~ʨi qani ɣa uβuj na waħij, jaqu ɣamil nja qu s~ɕqamas~ɕ nħa nuka, jas~ɕa quktan ta mtalaħ wajaj la,qmaʦ~ʨi ɣa ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕka ħlaħuj, nanu jas~ɕa qu ziħuŋ βalaj s~ɕan kaŋi, mħa tlu βlaq utux ɣa ini tħzjazij paŋa txalan, kruma ɣa s~ɕaziŋ ħi tħozjaj paŋa, s~ɕinxalan paŋa ɣa kruma ɣa ħβeβnu mintzju pqas~ɕu qmamas~ɕ.
